name: account.caldav
title: Account:CalDAV
description: The declaration to configure a Calendar account.

payload.content: A CalDAV configuration defines a CalDAV calendar and reminders account for a user.

payloadkeys.title: Account Name
payloadkeys.content: The name that apps show to the user for this calendar account. If not present, the system generates a suitable default.

payloadkeys.title: Server Host Name
payloadkeys.content: The hostname or IP address of the CalDAV server.

payloadkeys.title: Server Port
payloadkeys.content: The port number for the CalDAV server.

payloadkeys.title: Server Path
payloadkeys.content: The path for the CalDAV server.

payloadkeys.title: Authentication Credentials Asset Reference
payloadkeys.content: The identifier of an asset declaration that contains the credentials for this account. Set the corresponding asset type to `CredentialUserNameAndPassword`.
